title: Download Cluster Provision Binary
content:
# Download Cluster Provision Binary

Download Cluster Provision Binary

## Endpoint

`GET /orchestration/clusters/provision/bin/download`

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client(api_key="your-api-key")
response = client.orchestration.downloadOrchestrationClusterProvisionBinary()
print(response)

parameters.name: arch
parameters.description: Architecture of the binary to download. Options are `amd64`, `arm64`, `armv7` (default: `amd64`)

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Type of the binary to download. Options are `kubernetes`, `docker` (default: `kubernetes`)

schema.description: Cluster provision as a binary file.
